note: This is a SAMPLE file. Run ./infra/scripts/update-google-ips.sh json to fetch current ranges
usage_instructions: This file contains a SAMPLE of Google IP ranges
To get current ranges: ./infra/scripts/update-google-ips.sh json > infra/config/google-ips.json
Add these IP ranges to Vercel Trusted IPs or WAF exceptions
Update weekly to ensure coverage of new Google infrastructure
